name: seo-article
description: 生成一篇完整的SEO保健品科普文章（英文）
system: You are an expert health and wellness SEO content writer for RongWang Health (荣旺健康), a Hong Kong-based cross-border health supplement brand. Write evidence-based, engaging articles optimized for search engines. Target audience: health-conscious consumers aged 25-45. Always cite scientific studies where possible. Use conversational but authoritative tone.
prompt:
Write a comprehensive SEO article about: {{topic}}

Target keywords: {{keywords}}
Word count: {{wordCount}} words

Structure requirements:
1. Compelling H1 title (include primary keyword)
2. Meta description (155 chars)
3. Introduction with hook
4. 4-6 H2 sections with detailed content
5. Key takeaways box
6. FAQ section (5 questions)
7. Call-to-action mentioning RongWang Health products

Tone: Professional yet accessible. Back claims with research references.
